title.en: And with the passage of time, the Great Array w...

content.en:
The True Dao Mountain Lord wanted to withdraw, but the Wuji Heavenly Palace had already been prepared, and when the third-level battlefield array was arranged, it completely blocked the True Dao Domain.

The True Dao Mountain Lord crossed over to the battlefield barrier, wanting to break the barrier and go out while the great array had not yet been completely built.

However.

Rumble!

Rumble!

Rumble!

The bombardment again and again only caused the big array to tremble, but it couldn't break through the big array.

And with the passage of time, the Great Array was completely completed.

The True Dao Domain has been completely blocked.

In desperation, he could only return to the True Way Mountain.

......

Wuji Heavenly Palace made such a big move and set up a third-level battlefield array in the True Dao Domain, which naturally couldn't hide from Taisu Palace.

For the first time, the six sevenfold Dao realms of Taisu Palace descended, and the leader was Taisu.

However, the Six Cry Heavenly Venerable and the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable stopped Taisu and them.

"Taisu, stop!"

Six Cry Tianzun said.

"Six Heavenly Venerables, what are you going to do in the Infinite Heavenly Palace, why are you arranging a third-level battlefield array in the True Dao Domain???" Tai Quality asked.

Wow!

With a wave of his hand, the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable revealed an agreement from that place and a secret text.

"We have signed an agreement in the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and the True Dao Domain is about to become a third-level battlefield to reduce the burden on other battlefields, this matter has been decided, and there is no way to change it. What's the matter, are you Taisu Palace going to rebel?" said Hundred Battles Tianzun coldly.

Taisu stared at the agreement and didn't speak for a long time.

"Let's go!"

They withdrew one after another.

This Infinite Domain is still the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and they have no way to compete with the Taisu Palace, and they are not qualified to represent the Infinite Domain, so they don't even have a chance to refute.

After returning to Taisu Palace, Taisu and the others were extremely annoyed.

"What's going on, why did the True Dao Domain suddenly become a battlefield?"

"It's not yet time for the catastrophe to come, the Supreme Dao Void Demon hasn't invaded on a large scale, if it is a large-scale invasion, the Wuji Heavenly Palace will definitely let us be cannon fodder. Why is it that all of a sudden, there is an additional third-level battlefield???"

"There must be something we don't know about, let's go and ask. "

Subsequently.

The sevenfold Dao realms of Taisu Palace went to inquire about the news.

It wasn't long before they learned the details.

Knowing that it was the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable who retreated without a fight and lost the Luohe Fortress, this caused the anger over there, and the Wuji Heavenly Palace made the True Dao Domain a third-level battlefield, and it was just to exonerate himself.

"Damn Infinite Heavenly Palace!!"

Taisu was annoyed.

True Dao Mountain is one of the top subordinate forces under their command, and it was pitted by the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

In fact, even if the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable of the Wuji Heavenly Palace wanted to get rid of the crime, he could still discuss with the other forces of the Wuji Domain, choose a territory that would become a third-level battlefield, and allow some innocent people to withdraw.

But Wuji Heavenly Palace didn't spread any news at all, and directly blocked the True Dao Domain.

"Taisu, or start the plan now!"

Another Sevenfold Dao Realm said.

"No, it's too early to start the plan, just wait. If we start the plan now, we only have a 10% chance!" Tai Su shook his head.

The odds are too low for them to take any chances.

If they fail, they all have to die.

"The True Dao Domain has turned into a third-level battlefield, and we can't even enter it, and we are only allowed to enter the six-fold Dao realm at most. Moreover, the strength of the sixfold Dao realm will be suppressed, and only the fivefold Dao realm can really exert its full strength. On the third-level battlefield, the fifth-level Dao realm is the main force, and the third-fold and four-fold Dao realms can only be reduced to cannon fodder. With the style of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, we will definitely order the Supreme Dao Realm of our major forces to enter the third-level battlefield to fight against those Supreme Dao Void Demons. Tai Su guessed.

"That's for sure, but we can't say no yet. Another Sevenfold Dao Realm said helplessly.

......

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian also sensed that the entire Origin Realm seemed to have been stripped away by the Infinite Domain, and then he went out to investigate, only to find that the territory where the Origin Realm was located was blocked by the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

At first, he didn't understand what it was for.

But soon, the truth came out with all the information.

At this moment, the entire True Dao Domain, large and small, knew about the battlefield and the existence of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

All of a sudden, all the living beings in the entire True Dao Domain were terrified.

Even Ye Tian's face changed.

Because, when he heard a piece of news, the Origin Realm couldn't stop the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

The Origin Realm is cut off from everything, and the living beings in the outside world cannot enter, and no matter how powerful the Supreme Dao Realm is, it is difficult to enter the Origin Realm, unless it is an incomparably powerful Supreme Dao Realm, which directly crushes the Origin Realm.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon is different, the Supreme Dao Void Demon can devour the Origin Realm little by little, and finally break the barrier of the Origin Realm, thus killing into the Origin Realm.

How terrifying is the Dao Void Demon, once it enters the Origin Realm, who can stop it?

When the time comes, he will not be able to protect the land of eternity.

Of course, knowing that the Void Demons may not be able to look down on the Origin Realm, their first target is naturally other Supreme Dao Realms, but once the True Dao Domain is completely fallen, then the Eternal Realm will naturally not be able to be saved.

"You have to grow up as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian said urgently.

But what about the rapid improvement of strength now?

Ye Tian didn't have a good way for the time being.

"Infinite Dao Fruit!"

He thought of this treasure, which might help him quickly improve his strength.

In the past, he didn't dare to inquire about the information of the Infinite Dao Fruit, but now that the True Dao Domain was blocked, he naturally didn't care.

......

The ancient capital of the truth.

This is one of the ancient capitals under the command of the True Dao Mountain, and now there are a large number of Supreme Dao realms gathered here.

Because the entire True Dao Domain has been reduced to a third-level battlefield, this is undoubtedly one of the safest places.

When Ye Tian came here, he felt that every Supreme Dao Realm was extremely frightened, and they were all discussing how to leave the True Dao Domain.

However, even the True Dao Mountain Master can't leave, how can they go?

Unless you get permission from the Infinite Heavenly Palace, you can't leave, you can't go.

Subsequently, Ye Tian inquired about the information of Wuji Zhidao Fruit here, and it didn't take long for him to really inquire.

And this information also cost him thousands of Dao coins.

Soon, he knew what the Infinite Dao Fruit was.

"The Infinite Supreme Dao Tree is grown by absorbing the origin of the Origin Realm from the seeds of the Infinite Supreme Dao Tree, and the seeds of the Infinite Supreme Dao Tree come from outside the Infinite Domain. It takes millions of years or more to cultivate the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, and a Infinite Supreme Dao Tree can only give birth to one Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit. "

"The Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit can help the Supreme Dao Realm of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Consummation Realm comprehend the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, but it is not 100 percent, but the success rate is fifty percent. "

"The Infinite Extreme Dao Fruit also helps to break the bottleneck, and it is most suitable for the Sixfold Extreme Dao Realm to impact the Sevenfold Extreme Dao Realm!"

Now.

Ye Tiancai finally knew the value of the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, no wonder the Wuji Heavenly Palace was so angry.

"The Infinite Dao Fruit is really of great help to me, but if I refine it, it will be a pity!" Ye Tian muttered.

But if you think about it carefully, the current situation is very urgent, and you have to use it if you are reluctant. ！

Anyway, it was robbed, so you don't have to use it in vain.

"When you are cultivating to the peak of the First Rank Dao Realm, you will immediately use the Infinite Extreme Dao Fruit to break through the realm and impact the Twin Dao Realm, and by the way, you can also make the Eighth Sequence Rank Dao Rule Realm skyrocket!" Ye Tian thought to himself.
